title: Thero's Wilds
description: a wildlife mod about animals and many other stuff
body:
Thero's Wilds is a Exploration based Wilderness mod Adding New Animals and Plants to the Overworld,
Many new Discoveries Lie ahead in this new mod

This mod adds a array of new animals to minecraft
Making for a more Varied animal variety apart from
the animals that vanilla has, new plants
also generate in the wilds, if you like animal
or nature mods, this one is for you


<details>
<summary>Mobs of 1.2</summary>

- Anglerfish
- Army Ant
